Roman Catholic parish in Saint-Leonard

Église Sainte-Angèle

5275 Boulevard Lavoisier, Montréal, Québec

514-321-3644

Église Sainte-Angèle welcomes parishioners, neighbors, and visitors into a peaceful place of prayer, worship, and community life. Join us for Mass, reflection, and a warm parish presence rooted in faith.

Featured event

Fête de Marie

Saturday, August 15, 2026

To be confirmed

Join us as we celebrate the Feast of Mary with prayer, community, and a special Marian procession. All parishioners and visitors are welcome.

Serve together

Volunteer and Help the Community

Parishioners can contribute through music, hospitality, fundraising, community gatherings, outreach, and other forms of service throughout the year.

VolunteerContact the team

Seasonal and ongoing

Event and fundraiser support

Help prepare and support parish events, fundraising activities, and special community gatherings throughout the year.

Weekly or seasonal

Choir and music

Support liturgical celebrations, feast days, and parish gatherings through singing, music, and choir service.

Flexible

Hospitality and parish gatherings

Help welcome parishioners, organize refreshments, and support parish dinners, receptions, and community gatherings.

Monthly

Community support

Offer practical support for parish needs, charitable efforts, and activities that strengthen the wider community.

Give with purpose

Support worship, outreach, and care in the community

Support parish life, charitable outreach, community activities, and the ongoing mission of Sainte-Angèle Parish.

DonateLearn more

Église Sainte-Angèle

Église Sainte-Angèle is a warm Roman Catholic parish in Saint-Léonard where worship, prayer, and community life are shared in a calm and welcoming atmosphere.

5275 Boulevard Lavoisier, Montréal, Québec

Contact

514-321-3644

angelemerici@videotron.ca

Monday: 1:00 PM – 5:00 PM Tuesday: 1:00 PM – 5:00 PM Thursday: 1:00 PM – 5:00 PM
